summary: iter228 ECW Operations Phase 3 testing complete. 25/25 backend tests passed. All new features verified: Activity feed (POST/GET), P&L snapshot with forecast/budget variance banners (red/green/amber/neutral), Dashboard KPIs, Invoice drill-down + flagging with notifications, Delivery notifications, Commissary outlets (3 seeded: Production/Pastry/Storeroom) + catalog (6 items per commissary) + transfer requests, Echo Chef mimic-style with flavor signature preservation (10 dimensions), Recipe URL import. Frontend mobile ECW verified: Echo FAB positioned above tab bar (bottom=82px), Echo rail with 3 tabs (Activity/Dashboard/P&L), P&L view with expense lines and variance banners, Invoice modal with demo invoices, Recipes tab with 3 action buttons (From URL/Echo Chef/Drafts), Orders drawer with Commissary entry, Commissary view with 3 tabs and item list with qty inputs.

issues: Echo command palette overlay appears on page load - dismisses with Escape key

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend writes. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: Demo invoices (inv-demo-1/2/3) auto-seeded when invoices collection empty. Commissary outlets (com-production/com-pastry/com-storeroom) auto-seeded on first call. Commissary catalog items (6 per commissary) auto-seeded on first catalog call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter228 Phase 3 ECW Ops fully tested. Backend: All 17 new endpoints working. POST /activity creates events. GET /activity returns explicit + synthesized events from POs/line-checks/deliveries. GET /pnl-snapshot returns revenue/expenses/banners with color coding (red if expense > forecast AND % of sales higher, green if over forecast but % held, amber if over budget, neutral otherwise). GET /dashboard returns 7 KPIs. GET /invoices returns demo-seeded invoices. GET /invoices/{id} returns invoice with line_items. POST /invoices/{id}/flag creates flag + activity event + notifies accounting. POST /invoices/{id}/resolve-flag resolves flag. POST /deliveries/notify creates delivery + activity event. GET /commissary/outlets returns 3 seeded outlets. GET /commissary/catalog returns 6 items per commissary. POST /commissary/transfer-request creates transfer + activity event. POST /echo-chef/mimic-style returns draft_id + signature + dominant + prior_recipe_count + recipe (may have error field if LLM unavailable). GET /echo-chef/drafts lists drafts. POST /recipes/import-url parses recipe from URL. Frontend: Mobile /m/ecw has Echo FAB at bottom=82px (above 68px tab bar). FAB opens right-side rail with Activity/Dashboard/P&L tabs. P&L shows revenue, expense lines with variance banners, View invoices button. Invoice modal shows list with drill-down + flag button. Recipes tab has 3 action buttons (From URL, Echo Chef, Drafts). Orders drawer has Commissary entry. Commissary view has 3 tabs (Production/Pastry/Storeroom) with item list and qty inputs.
